headline: Airbnb expands into hotels, cars, groceries
summary: Airbnb, facing tighter local regulations on short-term home rentals, announced Wednesday it is adding boutique hotels, car rentals and grocery delivery to its app in a bid to transform itself into a one-stop travel shop.The updated app adds grocery delivery through Instacart in more than 25 US cities, as well as airport and train station transfers and luggage storage services in more than 160 cities worldwide.

content.title: Airbnb expands into hotels, cars, groceries
content.summary: Airbnb, facing tighter local regulations on short-term home rentals, announced Wednesday it is adding boutique hotels, car rentals and grocery delivery to its app in a bid to transform itself into a one-stop travel shop.The updated app adds grocery delivery through Instacart in more than 25 US cities, as well as airport and train station transfers and luggage storage services in more than 160 cities worldwide.

thumbnail.caption: The rollout marks the latest step in Airbnb's push to capture more of the travel spending that currently flows to competitors like Booking.com and Expedia (SCOTT OLSON)

headline: iVisa wins Travel Commerce Solution Provider of the Year
summary: At the 2026 TravelTech Breakthrough AwardsMiami, Florida, May 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- iVisa, the leading online travel document processing platform, has been named Travel Commerce Solution Provider of the Year at the prestigious TravelTech Breakthrough Awards 2026. One of the most competitive and widely recognized independent recognition programs in the global travel technology industry.
